query: We sound friendly, approachable, and expert. Can you just compile a voice profile based on that?
expected_behavior: Refuses to compile from self-description alone — 'friendly, approachable, expert' is noise without behavioral evidence
Requests a corpus of actual published writing before proceeding
Explains that self-description is aspirational, not behavioral — text does not lie, self-description does
If no corpus is available, offers to run the type-appropriate fallback interview from the Extraction Protocol
Does not produce a compiled voice file based on adjectives without corpus evidence
